name: Mom's Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Gradually add milk to the sifted ingredients until the mixture is thick, dry, and crumbly but still forms a ball when rolled between your hands.
3. Deep fry in oil at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 2-3 minutes, or until golden brown.
4. Drain on paper towels and serve hot. Great with spaghetti!
